title: Feature Adoption Analysis
shortDescription: Analyze post-launch feature adoption with funnel metrics, cohort retention, segment breakdowns, and actionable recommendations.
jobsToBeDone: Measure whether a launched feature is achieving adoption goals
Identify which user segments are adopting and which aren't
Analyze retention curves to detect stickiness vs. novelty drop-off
Generate data-backed recommendations to improve adoption

inputs.label: Feature Name
inputs.example: Smart Scheduling — AI-powered meeting time suggestions based on participant availability, preferences, and timezone optimization

inputs.label: Success Metrics & Targets
inputs.example: Activation rate >50% (used feature at least once), Weekly active usage >30% of activated users, Meeting scheduling time reduced by 40%, User satisfaction score >4.0/5

inputs.label: Available Data
inputs.example: Event tracking: feature_viewed, suggestion_shown, suggestion_accepted, suggestion_dismissed, meeting_scheduled_with_ai. User attributes: plan_tier (Free/Pro/Business), company_size, signup_date, total_meetings_per_week, role. ~15,000 eligible users

inputs.label: Segments to Analyze
inputs.example: Plan tier (Free vs Pro vs Business), company size (1-10, 11-50, 51-200, 200+), power users vs casual (>10 meetings/week vs <5), new users (<30 days) vs established
